description: Straightforward claim: valid CPT code 85025 (CBC with Differential) for a lab procedure, premium insurance plan covers the code, claimed amount matches expected fee schedule, no discrepancy. Agent should validate → verify → approve.

context.reported_procedure: Complete Blood Count with Differential — outpatient haematology screening ordered by Dr. A. Nair on 2024-03-18. Specimen collected at in-network lab facility. Patient is an established insured under PLAN-BLUE.
context.clinical_notes: Routine annual wellness panel. Patient: John D., 52M. No acute complaints. Physician ordered CBC as part of preventive care protocol. Specimen type: EDTA whole blood. Processing laboratory: City Central Clinical Laboratory (in-network).
